purpose: Internal AI knowledge layer for Smart-ADC, Smart-CAR-T, Smart-CMC, and AbEngineCore case logic. Injected into assistant system prompt only — not rendered on marketing or pricing web pages.
display_policy: Do not tell users to open internal wiki paths, case-study HTML URLs, or repo file paths.
Answer with conclusion, risk category, workflow routing, and validation route — same as public KB shape.
Website case-study pages (if they exist) are out of scope for the assistant to cite as navigation targets.

nih_ncbi_data_access.summary_en: Three tiers: (1) frozen InSynBio atlases in-console; (2) optional live local PDB BLAST in Detail mode; (3) literature IDs in frozen ADA/clinical packs — not live PubMed in chat unless owner enables E-utilities.
nih_ncbi_data_access.summary_zh: 三层：(1) Console 冻结图谱库；(2) Detail 模式可选本地 PDB BLAST；(3) 冻结 ADA/临床包中的文献 ID — 聊天默认不实时调 PubMed。

tiers.when_to_use: Approved-antibody lookup, target competitors, ADA incidence benchmarks, lightweight CMC reference.
tiers.how: User runs Clinical / Target / ADA / CMC Reference Atlas in console (500 credits per paid export). Data from curated TheraSAbDab + InSynBio atlas JSON — not a live NIH API call.
tiers.assistant_behavior: Route users to the atlas module for factual incidence/format lookup; do not invent ADA percentages.

tiers.when_to_use: User asks whether a provided Fv/VHH sequence resembles known PDB structures; Detail (Think) mode with sequence in message or attached report summary.
tiers.how: Server runs blastp via api/ncbi_blast_utils.py against local pdb_seqres (api/.data/ncbi_blast/pdb_seqres). Requires BLAST+ installed on API host.
tiers.assistant_behavior: If ncbi_structural_evidence is present in report_context, summarize top PDB hits (identity, e-value) without claiming clinical approval.

tiers.when_to_use: ADA evidence chains, label-backed incidence in internal ADA curation.
tiers.how: Frozen JSON under data/ADA_reliable_package and immunogenicity KB — not fetched live in assistant chat.
tiers.assistant_behavior: Say evidence is from curated clinical/label sources; recommend atlas or formal CMC/humanization run for the user's molecule.

not_available_in_chat: Live PubMed E-utilities search (esearch/efetch) unless separately integrated
Live ClinicalTrials.gov API unless separately integrated
UniProt live lookup unless separately integrated

key_points_en: Single billable CMC service: 10k snapshot or 25k with Smart-CMC (one debit).
FR-only optimization suggestions; CDR changes require offline redesign.
Interpret aggregation, charge patches, liabilities, glycosylation, free Cys as a set.
key_points_zh: CMC 单一服务：10k 快照或 25k 含 Smart-CMC。
框架区优化建议；CDR 改造需线下流程。
聚集、电荷、liability、糖基化、游离 Cys 综合解读。

key_points_en: Decision layers: target antigen density/internalization, linker cleavability, payload class, DAR, therapeutic index.
Assess naked antibody developability before conjugation heterogeneity.
No standalone ADC assembler service in console — strategic Q&A and expert/offline projects.
key_points_zh: 决策层：靶点密度/内吞、连接子、载荷、DAR、治疗窗。
偶联前先评估裸抗可开发性。
Console 无独立 ADC 组装计费服务 — 策略问答与线下项目。

key_points_en: Map target biology, indication, chassis, antigen density, safety to construct direction.
Layers: binder, hinge, TM, signaling, safety switch, delivery, manufacturing.
Formal assembly via car-t-assembler and cart-exvivo-* / cart-invivo-* console workflows (10k credits per scenario).
key_points_zh: 靶点、适应症、细胞底盘、抗原密度、安全性映射到构型。
结合域、铰链、跨膜、信号、安全开关、递送、生产。
正式组装走 Console CAR-T 模块（每场景 10k）。

key_points_en: Benchmark: 100% CDR retention mandatory; framework back-mutations only when structurally justified.
Illustrates why Quick Preview ≠ Standard Delivery sequence identity.
Blocking vs non-blocking must be structurally resolved; overlap with PD-1 site drives classification.
Routes to AF2-multimer offline when complex structure is required.
Per-arm VHH CMC plus fusion pI and linker recommendation; bispecific VHH CMC 10k credits.
Pairing and format risks explained conceptually; formal assembly 12k.
